   133→zrbf_sentinel() {
   134→  test "${ZRBF_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbf not kindled - call zrbf_kindle first"
   135→}
   136→
   137→zrbf_stitch_build_json() {
   138→  zrbf_sentinel
   139→
   140→  buc_log_args 'Stitching build JSON from step scripts'
   141→
   142→  # Step definitions: script|builder|entrypoint|id
   143→  # Entrypoint 'bash' uses args ["-lc", script], 'sh' uses ["-c", script]
   144→  # Note: Step 05 (buildx-create) was merged into step 06 because Cloud Build
   145→  # steps run in isolated containers - builder state doesn't persist across steps
   146→  #
   147→  # OCI Layout Bridge pattern (steps 06-08):
   148→  # - Step 06: buildx exports to /workspace/oci-layout (no auth needed)
   149→  # - Step 07: crane pushes from oci-layout to GAR (with metadata auth)
   150→  # - Step 08: Syft analyzes from oci-layout (faster, more accurate)
   151→  # - Step 10: Assembles metadata JSON from .image_uri
   152→  # - Step 09: Builds and pushes metadata container (depends on step 10)
   153→  # Delimiter is | because image refs contain colons (sha256 digests)
   154→  # Note: builder images pinned via RBRR_GCB_*_IMAGE_REF variables
   155→  local z_step_defs=(
   156→    "rbgjb01-derive-tag-base.sh|${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF}|bash|derive-tag-base"
   157→    "rbgjb02-get-docker-token.sh|${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF}|bash|get-docker-token"
   158→    "rbgjb03-docker-login-gar.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|docker-login-gar"
   159→    "rbgjb04-qemu-binfmt.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|qemu-binfmt"
   160→    "rbgjb06-build-and-export.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|build-and-export"
   161→    "rbgjb07-push-with-crane.sh|${RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF}|sh|push-with-crane"
   162→    "rbgjb08-sbom-and-summary.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|sbom-and-summary"
   163→    "rbgjb10-assemble-metadata.sh|${RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF}|sh|assemble-metadata"
   164→    "rbgjb09-build-and-push-metadata.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|build-and-push-metadata"
   165→  )
   166→
   167→  local z_def=""
   168→  local z_script=""
   169→  local z_builder=""
   170→  local z_entrypoint=""
   171→  local z_id=""
   172→  local z_script_path=""
   173→  local z_body=""
   174→  local z_arg_flag=""
   175→  local z_body_file=""
   176→  local z_escaped_file=""
   177→  local z_steps_file=""
   178→  local z_accumulator_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}steps.json"
   179→
   180→  buc_log_args "Initializing empty steps array"
   181→  echo "[]" > "${z_accumulator_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize steps JSON"
   182→
   183→  for z_def in "${z_step_defs[@]}"; do
   184→    IFS='|' read -r z_script z_builder z_entrypoint z_id <<< "${z_def}"
   185→    z_script_path="${ZRBF_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}/${z_script}"
   186→    z_body_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_body.txt"
   187→    z_escaped_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_escaped.txt"
   188→    z_steps_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_steps.json"
   189→
   190→    test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Step script not found: ${z_script_path}"
   191→
   192→    buc_log_args "Reading script body for ${z_id} (skip shebang, comments pass through)"
   193→    tail -n +2 "${z_script_path}" > "${z_body_file}" || buc_die "Failed to read step script: ${z_script_path}"
   194→    z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
   195→    test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty script body: ${z_script_path}"
   196→
   197→    buc_log_args "Baking pinned image refs into script text (GCB containers lack RBRR vars)"
   198→    z_body="${z_body//\$\{RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF\}/${RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF}}"
   199→    z_body="${z_body//\$\{RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF\}/${RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF}}"
   200→
   201→    buc_log_args "Escaping dollars for Cloud Build, preserving RBGY substitutions"
   202→    printf '%s' "${z_body}" | sed 's/\$/\$\$/g; s/\$\${_RBGY_/${_RBGY_/g' \
   203→      > "${z_escaped_file}" || buc_die "Failed to escape script body for ${z_id}"
   204→
   205→    case "${z_entrypoint}" in
   206→      bash) z_entrypoint="/bin/bash"; z_arg_flag="-lc" ;;
   207→      sh)   z_entrypoint="/bin/sh";   z_arg_flag="-c" ;;
   208→      *)    buc_die "Unknown entrypoint: ${z_entrypoint}" ;;
   209→    esac

   211→    buc_log_args "Appending step ${z_id} to JSON array"
   212→    jq \
   213→      --arg name "${z_builder}" \
   214→      --arg id "${z_id}" \
   215→      --arg ep "${z_entrypoint}" \
   216→      --arg flag "${z_arg_flag}" \
   217→      --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
   218→      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, entrypoint: $ep, args: [$flag, $script]}]' \
   219→      "${z_accumulator_file}" > "${z_steps_file}" \
   220→      || buc_die "Failed to append step ${z_id} to JSON"
   221→    mv "${z_steps_file}" "${z_accumulator_file}" \
   222→      || buc_die "Failed to update steps JSON for ${z_id}"
   223→  done
   224→
   225→  buc_log_args "Writing final stitched build structure"
   226→  jq '{steps: .}' "${z_accumulator_file}" > "${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}" \
   227→    || buc_die "Failed to write stitched build JSON"
   228→
   229→  buc_log_args "Stitched ${#z_step_defs[@]} steps to ${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}"
   230→}

   272→zrbf_verify_git_clean() {
   273→  zrbf_sentinel
   274→
   275→  buc_step "Verifying git repository state"
   276→
   277→  buc_log_args 'Check for uncommitted changes'
   278→  git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- || buc_die "Uncommitted changes detected - commit or stash first"
   279→
   280→  buc_log_args 'Check for untracked files'
   281→  git ls-files --others --exclude-standard > "${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to check untracked files"
   282→  local z_untracked=""
   283→  z_untracked=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read untracked list"
   284→  test -z "${z_untracked}" || buc_die "Untracked files present - commit or clean first"
   285→
   286→  buc_log_args 'Check if all commits are pushed'
   287→  git fetch --quiet || buc_die "git fetch failed"
   288→  git rev-list @{u}..HEAD --count > "${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || echo "0" > "${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}"
   289→  local z_unpushed=""
   290→  z_unpushed=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read ahead count"
   291→  test "${z_unpushed}" -eq 0 || buc_die "Local commits not pushed (${z_unpushed} commits ahead)"
   292→
   293→  buc_log_args 'Get git metadata'
   294→  git rev-parse HEAD              > "${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to get commit SHA"
   295→  git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD > "${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to get branch name"
   296→
   297→  buc_log_args 'Get first available remote'
   298→  git remote | head -1 > "${ZRBF_GIT_REMOTE_FILE}" || buc_die "No git remotes configured"
   299→  local z_remote=""
   300→  z_remote=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_REMOTE_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read remote name"
   301→  test -n "${z_remote}" || buc_die "No git remotes found"
   302→
   303→  buc_log_args 'Get repo URL from remote: ${z_remote}'
   304→  git config --get "remote.${z_remote}.url" > "${ZRBF_GIT_REPO_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to get repo URL"
   305→
   306→  local z_commit=""
   307→  local z_branch=""
   308→  local z_repo_url=""
   309→  z_commit=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read commit"
   310→  z_branch=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read branch"
   311→  z_repo_url=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_REPO_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read repo url"
   312→
   313→  test -n "${z_commit}"   || buc_die "Git commit is empty"
   314→  test -n "${z_branch}"   || buc_die "Git branch is empty"
   315→  test -n "${z_repo_url}" || buc_die "Git repo URL is empty"
   316→
   317→  buc_log_args 'Extract owner/repo from URL (handles both HTTPS and SSH)'
   318→  # Example HTTPS: https://github.com/owner/repo.git
   319→  # Example SSH  : git@github.com:owner/repo.git
   320→  local z_repo="${z_repo_url#*github.com[:/]}"
   321→  z_repo="${z_repo%.git}"
   322→
   323→  buc_log_args 'Write git info JSON'
   324→  jq -n                        \
   325→    --arg commit "${z_commit}" \
   326→    --arg branch "${z_branch}" \
   327→    --arg repo   "${z_repo}"   \
   328→    '{"commit": $commit, "branch": $branch, "repo": $repo}' \
   329→    > "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to write git info"
   330→
   331→  buc_info "Git state clean - commit: ${z_commit:0:8} on ${z_branch}"
   332→}

   334→zrbf_package_context() {
   335→  zrbf_sentinel
   336→
   337→  local z_dockerfile="$1"
   338→  local z_context_dir="$2"
   339→
   340→  buc_step 'Packaging build context (source only, no build config)'
   341→
   342→  buc_log_args 'Create temp directory for context'
   343→  rm -rf "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" || buc_warn "Failed to clean existing staging directory"
   344→  mkdir -p "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" || buc_die "Failed to create staging directory"
   345→
   346→  buc_log_args 'Copy context to staging'
   347→  cp -r "${z_context_dir}/." "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}/" || buc_die "Failed to copy context"
   348→
   349→  buc_log_args 'Copy Dockerfile to context root if not already there'
   350→  local z_dockerfile_name="${z_dockerfile##*/}"
   351→  cp "${z_dockerfile}" "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}/${z_dockerfile_name}" || buc_die "Failed to copy Dockerfile"
   352→
   353→  buc_log_args "Create tarball"
   354→  tar -czf "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONTEXT_TAR}" -C "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" . || buc_die "Failed to create context archive"
   355→
   356→  buc_log_args "Clean up staging"
   357→  rm -rf "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" || buc_warn "Failed to cleanup staging directory"
   358→
   359→  buc_log_args 'Compute archive size (bytes) using temp file'
   360→  wc -c < "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONTEXT_TAR}" > "${ZRBF_CONTEXT_SIZE_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to compute context size"
   361→  local z_size_bytes=""
   362→  z_size_bytes=$(<"${ZRBF_CONTEXT_SIZE_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read context size"
   363→  test -n "${z_size_bytes}" || buc_die "Context size is empty"
   364→
   365→  # Size policy: warn >1MB; die >10MB
   366→  if test "${z_size_bytes}" -gt 10485760; then
   367→    buc_die  "Context tarball too large: ${z_size_bytes} bytes (>10MB limit)"
   368→  elif test "${z_size_bytes}" -gt 1048576; then
   369→    buc_warn "Context tarball large: ${z_size_bytes} bytes (>1MB warning)"
   370→  fi
   371→
   372→  buc_info "Build context packaged: ${z_size_bytes} bytes"
   373→}

   434→zrbf_compose_build_request_json() {
   435→  zrbf_sentinel
   436→
   437→  # Stitch step scripts into build JSON
   438→  zrbf_stitch_build_json
   439→
   440→  jq empty "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONFIG_FILE}"    || buc_die "Build config is not valid JSON"
   441→  jq empty "${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}"  || buc_die "Stitched build file is not valid JSON"
   442→
   443→  local z_obj_name=""
   444→  z_obj_name=$(<"${ZRBF_TARBALL_NAME_FILE}") || buc_die "Missing tarball name"
   445→
   446→  # Merge steps from stitched build JSON with runtime substitutions and config
   447→  # Service account must be in projects/{project}/serviceAccounts/{email} format
   448→  local z_sa_resource="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
   449→  jq -n \
   450→    --slurpfile sub   "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONFIG_FILE}"    \
   451→    --slurpfile build "${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}"  \
   452→    --arg bucket "${RBGD_GCS_BUCKET}"                \
   453→    --arg object "${z_obj_name}"                     \
   454→    --arg sa     "${z_sa_resource}"                  \
   455→    --arg mtype  "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}"          \
   456→    --arg to     "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}"               \
   457→    '{
   458→      source: { storageSource: { bucket: $bucket, object: $object } },
   459→      steps: $build[0].steps,
   460→      substitutions: ($sub[0].substitutions),
   461→      options: { logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY", machineType: $mtype },
   462→      serviceAccount: $sa,
   463→      timeout: $to
   464→    }' > "${ZRBF_BUILD_REQUEST_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to compose build request json"
   465→}

   467→zrbf_submit_build_json() {
   468→  zrbf_sentinel
   469→  buc_step 'Submitting build (JSON) to Google Cloud Build'
   470→
   471→  local z_token=""
   472→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get GCB OAuth token"
   473→
   474→  curl -sS -X POST                              \
   475→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"       \
   476→    -H "Content-Type: application/json"         \
   477→    -H "Accept: application/json"               \
   478→    --data-binary @"${ZRBF_BUILD_REQUEST_FILE}" \
   479→    -o "${ZRBF_BUILD_RESPONSE_FILE}"            \
   480→    -w "%{http_code}"                           \
   481→    "${ZRBF_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" > "${ZRBF_BUILD_HTTP_CODE}" || buc_die "Build create request failed"
   482→
   483→  local z_http=""
   484→  z_http=$(<"${ZRBF_BUILD_HTTP_CODE}") || buc_die "No HTTP status from Cloud Build create"
   485→  test "${z_http}" = "200" -o "${z_http}" = "201" || buc_die "Cloud Build create failed (HTTP ${z_http})"
   486→  test -s "${ZRBF_BUILD_RESPONSE_FILE}" || buc_die "Empty Cloud Build response"
   487→
   488→  # Accept Operation or Build; prefer metadata.build.id else .id
   489→  local z_build_id=""
   490→  z_build_id=$(jq -r '(.metadata.build.id // .id // empty)' "${ZRBF_BUILD_RESPONSE_FILE}") || z_build_id=""
   491→  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build id not found in response"
   492→  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBF_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build id"
   493→
   494→  local z_console_url="${ZRBF_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
   495→  buc_info "Build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
   496→  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
   497→}

   501→zrbf_wait_build_completion() {
   502→  zrbf_sentinel
   503→
   504→  buc_step 'Waiting for build completion'
   505→
   506→  local z_build_id=""
   507→  z_build_id=$(<"${ZRBF_BUILD_ID_FILE}") || buc_die "No build ID found"
   508→  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID file empty"
   509→
   510→  buc_log_args 'Get fresh token for polling'
   511→  local z_token=""
   512→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get GCB OAuth token"
   513→
   514→  local z_status="PENDING"
   515→  local z_attempts=0
   516→  local z_max_attempts=960  # 80 minutes with 5 second intervals
   517→
   518→  while true; do
   519→    case "${z_status}" in PENDING|QUEUED|WORKING) : ;; *) break;; esac
   520→    sleep 5
   521→
   522→    z_attempts=$((z_attempts + 1))
   523→    test ${z_attempts} -le ${z_max_attempts} || buc_die "Build timeout after ${z_max_attempts} attempts"
   524→
   525→    buc_log_args "Fetch build status (attempt ${z_attempts}/${z_max_attempts})"
   526→    curl -s                                                \
   527→         -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
   528→         "${ZRBF_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}/${z_build_id}"    \
   529→         > "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}"                     \
   530→      || buc_die "Failed to get build status"
   531→
   532→    test -f "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" || buc_die "Build status file not created"
   533→    test -s "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" || buc_die "Build status file is empty"
   534→
   535→    jq -r '.status' "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_STATUS_CHECK_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to extract status"
   536→    z_status=$(<"${ZRBF_STATUS_CHECK_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read status"
   537→    test -n "${z_status}" || buc_die "Status is empty"
   538→
   539→    buc_info "Build status: ${z_status} (attempt ${z_attempts}/${z_max_attempts})"
   540→  done
   541→
   542→  test "${z_status}" = "SUCCESS" || buc_die "Build failed with status: ${z_status}"
   543→
   544→  buc_success 'Build completed successfully'
   545→}

   550→rbf_build() {
   551→  zrbf_sentinel
   552→
   553→  local z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"
   554→
   555→  # Documentation block
   556→  buc_doc_brief "Build container image from vessel using Google Cloud Build"
   557→  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
   558→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   559→
   560→  buc_log_args "Validate parameters"
   561→  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Vessel directory required"
   562→
   563→  # Load and validate vessel
   564→  zrbf_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
   565→
   566→  buc_log_args "Verify vessel has conjuring configuration"
   567→  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE)"
   568→  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT)"
   569→
   570→  buc_log_args "Resolve paths from vessel configuration"
   571→  test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" || buc_die "Dockerfile not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}"
   572→  test -d "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}" || buc_die "Build context not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}"
   573→
   574→  buc_log_args "Enforce vessel binfmt policy"
   575→  if test "${RBRV_CONJURE_BINFMT_POLICY}" = "forbid"; then
   576→    local z_native="$(uname -s | tr A-Z a-z)/$(uname -m)"
   577→    case " ${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS} " in
   578→      *"${z_native}"*) : ;;  # native arch allowed
   579→      *) buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' forbids binfmt but RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS='${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS}'" ;;
   580→    esac
   581→  fi
   582→
   583→  buc_log_args "Generate build tag using vessel sigil"
   584→  local z_tag="${RBRV_SIGIL}.${BURD_NOW_STAMP}"
   585→
   586→  buc_info "Building vessel image: ${RBRV_SIGIL} -> ${z_tag}"
   587→
   588→  # Verify GCB quota headroom before expensive packaging
   589→  buc_log_args "Check GCB quota headroom"
   590→  local z_quota_token=""
   591→  z_quota_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
   592→    || buc_die "Failed to get token for GCB quota check"
   593→  rbgd_check_gcb_quota "${z_quota_token}"
   594→
   595→  # Verify git state + capture metadata
   596→  zrbf_verify_git_clean
   597→
   598→  # Package build context (source code only; build config inlined in API request)
   599→  zrbf_package_context "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}"
   600→
   601→  # Prepare build substitutions (variable names kept as _RBGY_* for template compatibility)
   602→  local z_dockerfile_name="${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE##*/}"
   603→
   604→  buc_log_args 'Read git info from file'
   605→  jq -r '.commit' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to extract git commit"
   606→  jq -r '.branch' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to extract git branch"
   607→  jq -r '.repo'   "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_GIT_REPO_FILE}"   || buc_die "Failed to extract git repo"
   608→
   609→  local z_git_commit=""
   610→  local z_git_branch=""
   611→  local z_git_repo=""
   612→  z_git_commit=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read git commit"
   613→  z_git_branch=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read git branch"

   619→
   620→  buc_log_args 'Create build config with substitutions for RBGJB template'

   634→    --arg zjq_ark_suffix_image "${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"        \
   635→    --arg zjq_ark_suffix_about "${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"        \

   640→        _RBGY_MONIKER:        $zjq_moniker,
   641→        _RBGY_PLATFORMS:      $zjq_platforms,
   642→        _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION:   $zjq_gar_location,
   643→        _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT:    $zjq_gar_project,
   644→        _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY: $zjq_gar_repository,
   645→        _RBGY_GIT_COMMIT:     $zjq_git_commit,
   646→        _RBGY_GIT_BRANCH:     $zjq_git_branch,
   647→        _RBGY_GIT_REPO:       $zjq_git_repo,
   648→        _RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX:   $zjq_gar_host_suffix,
   649→        _RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE:  $zjq_ark_suffix_image,
   650→        _RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT:  $zjq_ark_suffix_about,
   651→        _RBGY_CRANE_TAR_GZ:     $zjq_crane_tar_gz
   652→      }
   653→    }' >  "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONFIG_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to create build config"
   654→
   655→  # Stage & submit new flow
   656→  zrbf_compose_tarball_name
   657→  zrbf_upload_context_to_gcs
   658→  zrbf_compose_build_request_json
   659→  zrbf_submit_build_json

   662→  zrbf_wait_build_completion

   697→rbf_delete() {
   698→  zrbf_sentinel
   699→
   700→  local z_locator="${1:-}"
   701→  local z_force="${2:-}"
   702→
   703→  # Documentation block
   704→  buc_doc_brief "Delete an image tag from the registry by locator"
   705→  buc_doc_param "locator" "Image locator in moniker:tag format (e.g., rbev-busybox:20251231T160211Z-img)"
   706→  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
   707→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   708→
   709→  # Validate locator parameter
   710→  test -n "${z_locator}" || buc_die "Locator parameter required (moniker:tag)"
   711→
   712→  # Parse locator into moniker and tag
   713→  case "${z_locator}" in
   714→    *:*) : ;;
   715→    *)   buc_die "Invalid locator format. Expected moniker:tag" ;;
   716→  esac
   717→  local z_moniker="${z_locator%%:*}"
   718→  local z_tag="${z_locator#*:}"
   719→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "Moniker is empty in locator"
   720→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag is empty in locator"
   721→
   722→  # Check for --force flag
   723→  local z_skip_confirm=false
   724→  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
   725→    z_skip_confirm=true
   726→  fi
   727→
   728→  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
   729→
   730→  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
   731→  local z_token
   732→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   733→
   734→  # Confirm deletion unless --force
   735→  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
   736→    buc_require "Will delete: ${z_locator}" "yes"
   737→  fi
   738→
   739→  buc_step "Deleting: ${z_locator}"
   740→
   741→  # Delete by tag reference
   742→  local z_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}status.txt"
   743→  local z_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}response.json"
   744→
   745→  curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
   746→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
   747→    -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
   748→    -o "${z_response_file}"                           \
   749→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_moniker}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
   750→    > "${z_status_file}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed"
   751→
   752→  local z_http_code
   753→  z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
   754→  test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty"
   755→
   756→  if test "${z_http_code}" != "202" && test "${z_http_code}" != "204"; then
   757→    buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_response_file}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
   758→    buc_die "Delete failed with HTTP ${z_http_code}"
   759→  fi
   760→
   761→  buc_success "Deleted or nonexistent: ${z_locator}"
   762→}

   764→rbf_list() {
   765→  zrbf_sentinel
   766→
   767→  # Documentation block
   768→  buc_doc_brief "List all locators (moniker:tag) in the Artifact Registry repository"
   769→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   770→
   771→  # Note: Ideally uses Retriever role, but Director also has read access
   772→  buc_step "Fetching OAuth token (Director)"
   773→  local z_token
   774→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   775→
   776→  buc_step "Listing all images in repository"
   777→
   778→  local z_packages_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_packages.json"
   779→  local z_gar_api="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com/v1"
   780→  local z_repo_path="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}/repositories/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
   781→
   782→  curl -sL \
   783→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   784→    "${z_gar_api}/${z_repo_path}/packages" \
   785→    > "${z_packages_file}" || buc_die "Failed to fetch packages"
   786→
   787→  # Check for error response
   788→  if jq -e '.error' "${z_packages_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   789→    local z_error
   790→    z_error=$(jq -r '.error.message // "Unknown error"' "${z_packages_file}")
   791→    buc_die "API error: ${z_error}"
   792→  fi
   793→
   794→  # Extract package monikers
   795→  local z_packages_list="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_packages.txt"
   796→  jq -r '.packages[]?.name // empty' "${z_packages_file}" | while read -r pkg; do
   797→    echo "${pkg##*/}"
   798→  done | sort > "${z_packages_list}"
   799→
   800→  echo "Repository: ${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}"

   802→  # For each moniker, fetch tags and emit locators
   803→  while IFS= read -r z_moniker; do

   809→
   810→    # Skip if error response
   811→    if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   812→      continue
   813→    fi
   814→
   815→    # Emit locators: moniker:tag
   816→    jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" | sort | while read -r z_tag; do
   817→      echo "${z_moniker}:${z_tag}"
   818→    done
   819→  done < "${z_packages_list}"
   820→
   821→  buc_success "List complete"

   824→rbf_beseech() {
   825→  zrbf_sentinel
   826→
   827→  # Documentation block
   828→  buc_doc_brief "Petition registry to reveal consecrated arks, correlating artifact pairs by shared consecration timestamp"
   829→  buc_doc_param "<vessel>" "Optional vessel filter - show only arks for this vessel"
   830→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   831→
   832→  # Optional vessel filter (strip path prefix — accept directory path or bare moniker)
   833→  local z_filter_vessel="${1:-}"
   834→  z_filter_vessel="${z_filter_vessel##*/}"
   835→
   836→  buc_step "Fetching OAuth token (Director)"
   837→  local z_token
   838→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   839→
   840→  buc_step "Enumerating arks from repository"
   841→
   842→  local z_packages_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_beseech_packages.json"
   843→  local z_gar_api="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com/v1"
   844→  local z_repo_path="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}/repositories/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
   845→
   846→  curl -sL \
   847→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   848→    "${z_gar_api}/${z_repo_path}/packages" \
   849→    > "${z_packages_file}" || buc_die "Failed to fetch packages"
   850→
   851→  # Check for error response
   852→  if jq -e '.error' "${z_packages_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   853→    local z_error
   854→    z_error=$(jq -r '.error.message // "Unknown error"' "${z_packages_file}")
   855→    buc_die "API error: ${z_error}"
   856→  fi
   857→
   858→  # Extract package monikers, optionally filter
   859→  local z_packages_list="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_beseech_packages.txt"
   860→  if [[ -n "${z_filter_vessel}" ]]; then
   861→    jq -r '.packages[]?.name // empty' "${z_packages_file}" | while read -r pkg; do
   862→      local moniker="${pkg##*/}"
   863→      if [[ "${moniker}" == "${z_filter_vessel}" ]]; then
   864→        echo "${moniker}"
   865→      fi
   866→    done | sort > "${z_packages_list}"
   867→  else
   868→    jq -r '.packages[]?.name // empty' "${z_packages_file}" | while read -r pkg; do
   869→      echo "${pkg##*/}"
   870→    done | sort > "${z_packages_list}"
   871→  fi
   872→
   873→  # Build ark correlation data
   874→  local z_arks_raw="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_beseech_arks_raw.txt"
   875→  > "${z_arks_raw}"  # Clear file
   876→
   877→  while IFS= read -r z_moniker; do
   878→    local z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_beseech_tags_${z_moniker}.json"
   879→    curl -sL \
   880→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   881→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_moniker}/tags/list" \
   882→      > "${z_tags_file}" 2>/dev/null || continue
   883→
   884→    # Skip if error response
   885→    if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   886→      continue
   887→    fi
   888→
   889→    # Process tags: extract consecrations and artifact types
   890→    jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" | while read -r z_tag; do
   891→      # Check for -image suffix
   892→      if [[ "${z_tag}" == *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}" ]]; then
   893→        local z_consecration="${z_tag%${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}}"
   894→        echo "${z_moniker}|${z_consecration}|image"
   895→      # Check for -about suffix
   896→      elif [[ "${z_tag}" == *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}" ]]; then
   897→        local z_consecration="${z_tag%${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}}"
   898→        echo "${z_moniker}|${z_consecration}|about"
   899→      fi
   900→      # Skip tags that are neither (plain image tags)
   901→    done >> "${z_arks_raw}"
   902→  done < "${z_packages_list}"
   903→
   904→  # Correlate artifacts into arks
   905→  local z_arks_correlated="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_beseech_arks_correlated.txt"
   906→  sort "${z_arks_raw}" | awk -F'|' '
   907→    {
   908→      key = $1 "|" $2
   909→      if ($3 == "image") {
   910→        has_image[key] = 1
   911→      } else if ($3 == "about") {
   912→        has_about[key] = 1
   913→      }
   914→      seen[key] = 1
   915→    }
   916→    END {
   917→      for (k in seen) {
   918→        split(k, parts, "|")
   919→        vessel = parts[1]
   920→        consecration = parts[2]
   921→        image_mark = (has_image[k] ? "✓" : "✗")
   922→        about_mark = (has_about[k] ? "✓" : "✗")
   923→        printf "%-30s %-20s %-8s %-8s\n", vessel, consecration, image_mark, about_mark
   924→      }
   925→    }
   926→  ' | sort -k1,1 -k2,2r > "${z_arks_correlated}"
   927→
   928→  # Display header and results
   929→  printf "%-30s %-20s %-8s %-8s\n" "VESSEL" "CONSECRATION" "-image" "-about"
   930→  cat "${z_arks_correlated}"
   931→
   932→  buc_success "Beseech complete"
   933→}

  1001→rbf_summon() {
  1002→  zrbf_sentinel
  1003→
  1004→  local z_vessel="${1:-}"
  1005→  z_vessel="${z_vessel##*/}"  # strip path prefix — accept directory path or bare moniker
  1006→  local z_consecration="${2:-}"
  1007→
  1008→  # Documentation block
  1009→  buc_doc_brief "Summon an ark (pull both -image and -about artifacts as a coherent unit)"
  1010→  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel name (e.g., rbev-busybox)"
  1011→  buc_doc_param "consecration" "Consecration timestamp (e.g., 20250206T120000Z)"
  1012→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
  1013→
  1014→  buc_log_args "Validate parameters"
  1015→  test -n "${z_vessel}" || buc_die "Vessel parameter required"
  1016→  test -n "${z_consecration}" || buc_die "Consecration parameter required"
  1017→
  1018→  buc_step "Authenticating for retrieval"
  1019→
  1020→  # Prefer Retriever credentials, fallback to Director
  1021→  local z_rbra_file=""
  1022→  if test -n "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE:-}" && test -f "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"; then
  1023→    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
  1024→    buc_info "Using Retriever credentials"
  1025→  else
  1026→    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
  1027→    buc_info "Retriever not configured, using Director credentials"
  1028→  fi
  1029→
  1030→  # Get OAuth token
  1031→  local z_token
  1032→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_rbra_file}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
  1033→
  1034→  # Construct ark tags
  1035→  local z_image_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
  1036→  local z_about_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
  1037→
  1038→  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"
  1039→
  1040→  # Check if -image artifact exists
  1041→  local z_image_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_image_status.txt"
  1042→  local z_image_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_image_response.json"
  1043→
  1044→  curl --head -s                                     \
  1045→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1046→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1047→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1048→    -o "${z_image_response_file}"                   \
  1049→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
  1050→    > "${z_image_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -image artifact"
  1051→
  1052→  local z_image_http_code
  1053→  z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_status_file}")
  1054→  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image"
  1055→
  1056→  local z_image_exists=false
  1057→  if test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1058→    z_image_exists=true
  1059→  elif test "${z_image_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1060→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_image_http_code} when checking -image artifact"
  1061→  fi
  1062→
  1063→  # Check if -about artifact exists
  1064→  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_about_status.txt"
  1065→  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_about_response.json"
  1066→
  1067→  curl --head -s                                     \
  1068→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1069→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1070→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1071→    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
  1072→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
  1073→    > "${z_about_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact"
  1074→
  1075→  local z_about_http_code
  1076→  z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_status_file}")
  1077→  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"
  1078→
  1079→  local z_about_exists=false
  1080→  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1081→    z_about_exists=true
  1082→  elif test "${z_about_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1083→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_about_http_code} when checking -about artifact"
  1084→  fi
  1085→
  1086→  # Evaluate ark state
  1087→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1088→    buc_die "Ark not found: neither -image nor -about exists"
  1089→  fi
  1090→
  1091→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1092→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -image exists but -about is missing"
  1093→  elif test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1094→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -about exists but -image is missing"
  1095→  fi
  1096→
  1097→  buc_step "Logging into container registry"
  1098→
  1099→  # Docker login to GAR
  1100→  echo "${z_token}" | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "https://${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}" \
  1101→    || buc_die "Container runtime authentication failed"
  1102→
  1103→  # Pull -image artifact if exists
  1104→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1105→    buc_step "Pulling -image artifact"
  1106→
  1107→    local z_image_ref="${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag}"
  1108→    docker pull "${z_image_ref}" || buc_die "Failed to pull -image artifact"
  1109→    buc_info "Retrieved: ${z_image_ref}"
  1110→  fi
  1111→
  1112→  # Pull -about artifact if exists
  1113→  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1114→    buc_step "Pulling -about artifact"
  1115→
  1116→    local z_about_ref="${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag}"
  1117→    docker pull "${z_about_ref}" || buc_die "Failed to pull -about artifact"
  1118→    buc_info "Retrieved: ${z_about_ref}"
  1119→  fi
  1120→
  1121→  # Display results
  1122→  echo ""
  1123→  buc_success "Ark summoned: ${z_vessel}/${z_consecration}"
  1124→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1125→    echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag} retrieved"
  1126→  fi
  1127→  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1128→    echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag} retrieved"
  1129→  fi
  1130→}

  1132→rbf_abjure() {
  1133→  zrbf_sentinel
  1134→
  1135→  local z_vessel="${1:-}"
  1136→  z_vessel="${z_vessel##*/}"  # strip path prefix — accept directory path or bare moniker
  1137→  local z_consecration="${2:-}"
  1138→  local z_force="${3:-}"
  1139→
  1140→  # Documentation block
  1141→  buc_doc_brief "Abjure an ark (delete both -image and -about artifacts as a coherent unit)"
  1142→  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel name (e.g., rbev-busybox)"
  1143→  buc_doc_param "consecration" "Consecration timestamp (e.g., 20250206T120000Z)"
  1144→  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
  1145→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
  1146→
  1147→  # Validate parameters
  1148→  test -n "${z_vessel}" || buc_die "Vessel parameter required"
  1149→  test -n "${z_consecration}" || buc_die "Consecration parameter required"
  1150→
  1151→  # Check for --force flag in remaining arguments
  1152→  local z_skip_confirm=false
  1153→  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
  1154→    z_skip_confirm=true
  1155→  fi
  1156→
  1157→  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  1158→
  1159→  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
  1160→  local z_token
  1161→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
  1162→
  1163→  # Construct ark tags
  1164→  local z_image_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
  1165→  local z_about_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
  1166→
  1167→  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"
  1168→
  1169→  # Check if -image artifact exists
  1170→  local z_image_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}image_status.txt"
  1171→  local z_image_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}image_response.json"
  1172→
  1173→  curl --head -s                                     \
  1174→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1175→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1176→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1177→    -o "${z_image_response_file}"                   \
  1178→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
  1179→    > "${z_image_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -image artifact"
  1180→
  1181→  local z_image_http_code
  1182→  z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_status_file}")
  1183→  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image"
  1184→
  1185→  local z_image_exists=false
  1186→  if test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1187→    z_image_exists=true
  1188→  elif test "${z_image_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1189→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_image_http_code} when checking -image artifact"
  1190→  fi
  1191→
  1192→  # Check if -about artifact exists
  1193→  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}about_status.txt"
  1194→  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}about_response.json"
  1195→
  1196→  curl --head -s                                     \
  1197→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1198→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1199→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1200→    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
  1201→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
  1202→    > "${z_about_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact"
  1203→
  1204→  local z_about_http_code
  1205→  z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_status_file}")
  1206→  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"
  1207→
  1208→  local z_about_exists=false
  1209→  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1210→    z_about_exists=true
  1211→  elif test "${z_about_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1212→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_about_http_code} when checking -about artifact"
  1213→  fi
  1214→
  1215→  # Evaluate ark state
  1216→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1217→    buc_die "Ark not found: neither -image nor -about exists"
  1218→  fi
  1219→
  1220→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1221→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -image exists but -about is missing"
  1222→  elif test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1223→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -about exists but -image is missing"
  1224→  fi
  1225→
  1226→  # Confirm abjuration unless --force
  1227→  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
  1228→    local z_confirm_msg="Will abjure ark ${z_vessel}/${z_consecration}:"
  1229→    if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1230→      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag}"
  1231→    fi
  1232→    if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1233→      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag}"
  1234→    fi
  1235→    buc_require "${z_confirm_msg}" "yes"
  1236→  fi
  1237→
  1238→  # Delete -image artifact if exists
  1239→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1240→    buc_step "Deleting -image artifact"
  1241→
  1242→    local z_delete_image_status="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_status.txt"
  1243→    local z_delete_image_response="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_response.json"
  1244→
  1245→    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
  1246→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
  1247→      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
  1248→      -o "${z_delete_image_response}"                   \
  1249→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
  1250→      > "${z_delete_image_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -image"
  1251→
  1252→    local z_delete_image_code
  1253→    z_delete_image_code=$(<"${z_delete_image_status}")
  1254→    test -n "${z_delete_image_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image delete"
  1255→
  1256→    if test "${z_delete_image_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_image_code}" != "204"; then
  1257→      buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_delete_image_response}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
  1258→      buc_die "Failed to delete -image artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_image_code})"
  1259→    fi
  1260→
  1261→    buc_info "Deleted: ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag}"
  1262→  fi
  1263→
  1264→  # Delete -about artifact if exists
  1265→  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1266→    buc_step "Deleting -about artifact"
  1267→
  1268→    local z_delete_about_status="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_status.txt"
  1269→    local z_delete_about_response="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_response.json"
  1270→
  1271→    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
  1272→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
  1273→      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
  1274→      -o "${z_delete_about_response}"                   \
  1275→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
  1276→      > "${z_delete_about_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -about"
  1277→
  1278→    local z_delete_about_code
  1279→    z_delete_about_code=$(<"${z_delete_about_status}")
  1280→    test -n "${z_delete_about_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about delete"
  1281→
  1282→    if test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "204"; then
  1283→      buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_delete_about_response}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
  1284→      buc_die "Failed to delete -about artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_about_code})"
  1285→    fi
  1286→
  1287→    buc_info "Deleted: ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag}"
  1288→  fi
  1289→
  1290→  # Display results
  1291→  echo ""
  1292→  buc_success "Ark abjured: ${z_vessel}/${z_consecration}"
  1293→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1294→    echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag} deleted"
  1295→  fi
  1296→  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1297→    echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag} deleted"
  1298→  fi
  1299→}

    30→zrbi_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbi already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Verify RBGO is available
    34→  test "${ZRBGO_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgo not kindled - must kindle rbgo before rbi"
    35→
    36→  # Check required environment
    37→  test -n "${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY:-}" || buc_die "RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY not set"
    38→  test -n "${BURD_TEMP_DIR:-}"        || buc_die "BURD_TEMP_DIR not set"
    39→
    40→  # Verify GAR service account file is configured
    41→  test -n "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE:-}"   || buc_die "RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE not set"
    42→  test -f "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"     || buc_die "GAR service env file not found: ${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
    43→
    44→  # Module Variables (ZRBI_*)
    45→  ZRBI_REGISTRY_HOST="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
    46→  ZRBI_REGISTRY_PATH="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
    47→  ZRBI_REGISTRY_API_BASE="https://${ZRBI_REGISTRY_HOST}/v2/${ZRBI_REGISTRY_PATH}"
    48→  ZRBI_GAR_API_BASE="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com/v1"
    49→  ZRBI_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}/repositories/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
    50→
    51→  # Media types
    52→  ZRBI_MTYPE_DLIST="application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json"
    53→  ZRBI_MTYPE_OCI="application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json"
    54→  ZRBI_MTYPE_DV2="application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json"
    55→  ZRBI_MTYPE_OCM="application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json"
    56→  ZRBI_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES="${ZRBI_MTYPE_DV2},${ZRBI_MTYPE_DLIST},${ZRBI_MTYPE_OCI},${ZRBI_MTYPE_OCM}"
    57→
    58→  # File prefixes for all operations
    59→  ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_manifest_"
    60→  ZRBI_CONFIG_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_config_"
    61→  ZRBI_DETAIL_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_detail_"
    62→  ZRBI_TOKEN_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_token_"
    63→  ZRBI_TAGS_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_tags_"
    64→  ZRBI_METADATA_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_metadata_"
    65→
    66→  # Output files
    67→  ZRBI_IMAGE_RECORDS_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_IMAGE_RECORDS.json"
    68→  ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_IMAGE_DETAILS.json"
    69→  ZRBI_IMAGE_STATS_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_IMAGE_STATS.json"
    70→  ZRBI_FQIN_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_FQIN.txt"
    71→  ZRBI_TOKEN_FILE="${ZRBI_TOKEN_PREFIX}access.txt"
    72→  ZRBI_METADATA_ARCHIVE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_metadata.tgz"
    73→
    74→  # File index counter

    77→  # Initialize detail file

    79→
    80→  # Obtain initial OAuth token

    85→
    86→zrbi_sentinel() {
    87→  test "${ZRBI_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbi not kindled - call zrbi_kindle first"
    88→}
    89→
    90→zrbi_refresh_token() {
    91→  # No sentinel check - called from kindle before KINDLED=1
    92→  buc_log_args "Obtaining OAuth token for GAR API"
    93→  local z_token=""
    94→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token from RBGO"
    95→  echo "${z_token}" > "${ZRBI_TOKEN_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to write token file"
    96→}
    97→
    98→zrbi_get_next_index_capture() {
    99→  zrbi_sentinel
   100→
   101→  ZRBI_FILE_INDEX=$((ZRBI_FILE_INDEX + 1))
   102→  printf "%03d" "${ZRBI_FILE_INDEX}"
   103→}
   104→
   105→zrbi_curl_registry() {
   106→  zrbi_sentinel
   107→
   108→  local z_url="$1"
   109→  local z_token
   110→  z_token=$(<"${ZRBI_TOKEN_FILE}")
   111→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token is empty"
   112→
   113→  curl -sL                                          \
   114→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   115→      -H "Accept: ${ZRBI_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"   \
   116→      "${z_url}"                                    \
   117→    || buc_die "Registry API call failed: ${z_url}"
   118→}
   119→
   120→zrbi_process_single_manifest() {
   121→  zrbi_sentinel
   122→
   123→  local z_tag="$1"
   124→  local z_manifest_file="$2"
   125→  local z_platform="${3:-}"  # Empty for single-platform
   126→
   127→  # Get config digest
   128→  local z_config_digest_file="${ZRBI_CONFIG_PREFIX}digest.txt"
   129→  jq -r '.config.digest' "${z_manifest_file}" > "${z_config_digest_file}" || buc_die "Failed to extract config digest"
   130→
   131→  local z_config_digest
   132→  z_config_digest=$(<"${z_config_digest_file}")
   133→  test -n "${z_config_digest}" || buc_die "Config digest is empty"
   134→  test "${z_config_digest}" != "null" || {
   135→    buc_warn "null config.digest in manifest"
   136→    return 0
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  # Fetch config blob
   140→  local z_idx
   141→  z_idx=$(zrbi_get_next_index_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get next index"
   142→  local z_config_out="${ZRBI_CONFIG_PREFIX}${z_idx}.json"
   143→
   144→  zrbi_curl_registry "${ZRBI_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/blobs/${z_config_digest}" > "${z_config_out}" \
   145→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch config blob"
   146→
   147→  # Validating config JSON
   148→  jq . "${z_config_out}" > /dev/null || buc_die "Invalid config JSON"
   149→
   150→  # Build detail entry
   151→  local z_detail_idx
   152→  z_detail_idx=$(zrbi_get_next_index_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get detail index"
   153→  local z_temp_detail="${ZRBI_DETAIL_PREFIX}${z_detail_idx}.json"
   154→
   155→  local z_manifest_json=$(<"${z_manifest_file}")
   156→  test -n "${z_manifest_json}" || buc_die "Manifest JSON is empty"
   157→
   158→  # Normalize config with defaults
   159→  local z_config_normalized="${ZRBI_CONFIG_PREFIX}normalized_${z_idx}.json"
   160→  jq '. + {
   161→        created: (.created // "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z"),
   162→        architecture: (.architecture // "unknown"),
   163→        os: (.os // "unknown")
   164→      }' "${z_config_out}" > "${z_config_normalized}" \
   165→    || buc_die "Failed to normalize config"
   166→
   167→  local z_config_json=$(<"${z_config_normalized}")
   168→  test -n "${z_config_json}" || buc_die "Normalized config is empty"
   169→
   170→  if test -n "${z_platform}"; then
   171→    jq -n \
   172→      --arg tag          "${z_tag}"           \
   173→      --arg platform     "${z_platform}"      \
   174→      --arg digest       "${z_config_digest}" \
   175→      --argjson manifest "${z_manifest_json}" \
   176→      --argjson config   "${z_config_json}" '
   177→      {
   178→        tag: $tag,
   179→        platform: $platform,
   180→        digest: $digest,
   181→        layers: $manifest.layers,
   182→        config: {
   183→          created: $config.created,
   184→          architecture: $config.architecture,
   185→          os: $config.os
   186→        }
   187→      }' > "${z_temp_detail}" || buc_die "Failed to build platform detail"
   188→  else
   189→    jq -n \
   190→      --arg     tag      "${z_tag}"           \
   191→      --arg     digest   "${z_config_digest}" \
   192→      --argjson manifest "${z_manifest_json}" \
   193→      --argjson config   "${z_config_json}" '
   194→      {
   195→        tag: $tag,
   196→        digest: $digest,
   197→        layers: $manifest.layers,
   198→        config: {
   199→          created: $config.created,
   200→          architecture: $config.architecture,
   201→          os: $config.os
   202→        }
   203→      }' > "${z_temp_detail}" || buc_die "Failed to build single detail"
   204→  fi
   205→
   206→  # Append to detail file
   207→  buc_log_args "Merging image detail"
   208→  local    z_detail_tmp="${ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE}.tmp"
   209→  jq -s '.[0] + [.[1]]' "${ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE}" "${z_temp_detail}" \
   210→    > "${z_detail_tmp}" || buc_die "Failed to merge image detail"
   211→  mv  "${z_detail_tmp}" "${ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to move detail file"
   212→}
   213→
   214→######################################################################
   215→# External Functions (rbi_*)
   216→
   217→rbi_list() {
   218→  zrbi_sentinel
   219→
   220→  # Documentation block
   221→  buc_doc_brief "List all available image tags from registry"
   222→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   223→
   224→  buc_step "Fetching image tags from GAR"
   225→
   226→  # GAR uses Docker Registry v2 API - list tags endpoint
   227→  local z_tags_response="${ZRBI_TAGS_PREFIX}response.json"
   228→
   229→  zrbi_curl_registry "${ZRBI_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/tags/list" > "${z_tags_response}" \
   230→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags list"
   231→
   232→  # Transform to records format
   233→  jq -r --arg prefix "${ZRBI_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBI_REGISTRY_PATH}" \
   234→      '[.tags[] | {tag: ., fqin: ($prefix + "/" + .)}]'              \
   235→      "${z_tags_response}" > "${ZRBI_IMAGE_RECORDS_FILE}"           \
   236→    || buc_die "Failed to transform tags"
   237→
   238→  local z_total_file="${ZRBI_TAGS_PREFIX}total.txt"
   239→  jq '. | length' "${ZRBI_IMAGE_RECORDS_FILE}" > "${z_total_file}" || buc_die "Failed to count tags"
   240→
   241→  local z_total
   242→  z_total=$(<"${z_total_file}")
   243→  test -n "${z_total}" || buc_die "Total count is empty"
   244→
   245→  buc_info "Retrieved ${z_total} total image records"
   246→
   247→  # Display tags to stdout
   248→  echo "Repository: ${ZRBI_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBI_REGISTRY_PATH}"
   249→  echo "Images:"
   250→  jq -r '.[] | .tag' "${ZRBI_IMAGE_RECORDS_FILE}" | sort -r | head -20
   251→
   252→  test "${z_total}" -gt 20 && echo "... (showing 20 of ${z_total} tags)"
   253→
   254→  buc_success "List complete - ${z_total} images"
   255→}
   256→
   257→rbi_show() {
   258→  zrbi_sentinel
   259→
   260→  local z_tag="${1:-}"
   261→
   262→  # Documentation block
   263→  buc_doc_brief "Fetch and display manifest/config for an image tag"
   264→  buc_doc_param "tag" "Image tag to fetch manifest for"
   265→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   266→
   267→  # Validate parameters
   268→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag parameter required"
   269→
   270→  buc_step "Fetching manifest for: ${z_tag}"
   271→
   272→  local z_idx
   273→  z_idx=$(zrbi_get_next_index_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get index"
   274→  local z_manifest_out="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}${z_idx}.json"
   275→
   276→  zrbi_curl_registry "${ZRBI_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/manifests/${z_tag}" > "${z_manifest_out}" \
   277→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch manifest for ${z_tag}"
   278→
   279→  jq . "${z_manifest_out}" >/dev/null || buc_die "Invalid manifest JSON"
   280→
   281→  local z_media_type_file="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}mediatype_${z_idx}.txt"
   282→  jq -r '.mediaType // .schemaVersion' "${z_manifest_out}" > "${z_media_type_file}" \
   283→    || buc_die "Failed to extract media type"
   284→
   285→  local z_media_type=$(<"${z_media_type_file}")
   286→  test -n "${z_media_type}" || buc_die "Failed to read or empty: ${z_media_type_file}"
   287→
   288→  if test "${z_media_type}" = "${ZRBI_MTYPE_DLIST}" || \
   289→     test "${z_media_type}" = "${ZRBI_MTYPE_OCI}"; then
   290→
   291→    buc_info "Multi-platform image detected"
   292→
   293→    local z_manifests_file="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}list_${z_idx}.jsonl"
   294→    jq -c '.manifests[]' "${z_manifest_out}" > "${z_manifests_file}" \
   295→      || buc_die "Failed to extract manifests"
   296→
   297→    local z_platform_idx=0
   298→    while IFS= read -r z_platform_manifest; do
   299→      local z_platform_digest_file="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}digest_${z_platform_idx}.txt"
   300→      jq -r '.digest' <<<"${z_platform_manifest}" > "${z_platform_digest_file}" \
   301→        || buc_die "Failed to extract platform digest"
   302→
   303→      local z_platform_digest=$(<"${z_platform_digest_file}")
   304→      test -n "${z_platform_digest}" || buc_die "Failed to read or empty: ${z_platform_digest_file}"
   305→
   306→      local z_platform_info_file="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}info_${z_platform_idx}.txt"
   307→      jq -r '"\(.platform.os)/\(.platform.architecture)"' <<<"${z_platform_manifest}" > "${z_platform_info_file}" \
   308→        || buc_die "Failed to extract platform info"
   309→
   310→      local z_platform_info=$(<"${z_platform_info_file}")
   311→      test -n "${z_platform_info}" || buc_die "Failed to read or empty: ${z_platform_info_file}"
   312→
   313→      buc_info "Processing platform: ${z_platform_info}"
   314→
   315→      local z_platform_idx_str
   316→      z_platform_idx_str=$(zrbi_get_next_index_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get platform index"
   317→      local z_platform_out="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}${z_platform_idx_str}.json"
   318→
   319→      zrbi_curl_registry "${ZRBI_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/manifests/${z_platform_digest}" \
   320→        > "${z_platform_out}" || buc_die "Failed to fetch platform manifest"
   321→
   322→      jq . "${z_platform_out}" > /dev/null || buc_die "Invalid platform manifest JSON"
   323→
   324→      zrbi_process_single_manifest "${z_tag}" "${z_platform_out}" "${z_platform_info}"
   325→
   326→      z_platform_idx=$((z_platform_idx + 1))
   327→    done < "${z_manifests_file}"
   328→
   329→  else
   330→    buc_info "Single platform image"
   331→    zrbi_process_single_manifest "${z_tag}" "${z_manifest_out}" ""
   332→  fi
   333→
   334→  # Display summary
   335→  echo "Image: ${z_tag}"
   336→  echo "Details saved to: ${ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE}"
   337→  jq '.' "${ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE}" || buc_warn "Failed to display details"
   338→
   339→  buc_success "Manifest and config retrieved"
   340→}
   341→
   342→rbi_metadata() {
   343→  zrbi_sentinel
   344→
   345→  local z_tag="${1:-}"
   346→
   347→  buc_doc_brief "Download GAR build metadata archive for a tag"
   348→  buc_doc_param "tag" "Image tag to fetch metadata for"
   349→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   350→
   351→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag parameter required"
   352→
   353→  # Refresh token to avoid expiry
   354→  zrbi_refresh_token
   355→
   356→  local z_token
   357→  z_token=$(<"${ZRBI_TOKEN_FILE}") || buc_die "Token read failed"
   358→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Empty token"
   359→
   360→  local z_package_path="${ZRBI_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBI_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_tag}"
   361→
   362→  buc_step "Downloading GAR metadata for: ${z_tag}"
   363→  curl -s                                             \
   364→       -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"          \
   365→       "${z_package_path}/versions/metadata:download" \
   366→       -o "${ZRBI_METADATA_ARCHIVE}"                  \
   367→    || buc_die "Failed to download metadata"
   368→
   369→  test -f "${ZRBI_METADATA_ARCHIVE}" || buc_die "Metadata archive not created"
   370→  test -s "${ZRBI_METADATA_ARCHIVE}" || buc_die "Metadata archive is empty"
   371→
   372→  local z_extract_dir="${ZRBI_METADATA_PREFIX}${z_tag}"
   373→  rm -rf "${z_extract_dir}" || buc_warn "Failed to clean previous extract dir"
   374→  mkdir -p "${z_extract_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to create extract directory"
   375→  tar -xzf "${ZRBI_METADATA_ARCHIVE}" -C "${z_extract_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to extract metadata"
   376→
   377→  if test -f "${z_extract_dir}/package_summary.txt"; then
   378→    buc_info "Top packages in image:"
   379→    head -5 "${z_extract_dir}/package_summary.txt" || buc_warn "Failed to show package summary"
   380→  fi
   381→
   382→  buc_success "Metadata retrieved to ${z_extract_dir}"
   383→}
   384→
   385→rbi_fqin() {
   386→  zrbi_sentinel
   387→
   388→  local z_tag="${1:-}"
   389→
   390→  # Documentation block
   391→  buc_doc_brief "Create fully qualified image name"
   392→  buc_doc_param "tag" "Image tag to qualify"
   393→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   394→
   395→  # Validate parameters
   396→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag parameter required"
   397→
   398→  # Write FQIN to file
   399→  local z_fqin="${ZRBI_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBI_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_tag}"
   400→  echo "${z_fqin}" > "${ZRBI_FQIN_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to write FQIN"
   401→
   402→  # Also output to stdout for direct use
   403→  echo "${z_fqin}"
   404→
   405→  buc_success "FQIN generated"
   406→}

   408→# eof
   409→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.

    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and

    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle Google OAuth - Service account JWT authentication
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBGO_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgo multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBGO_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbgo_*)
    29→
    30→zrbgo_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBGO_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgo already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Validate required tools (rehomed from rbl_Locator.sh)
    34→  command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "openssl not found - required for JWT signing"
    35→  command -v curl    >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "curl not found - required for OAuth exchange"
    36→  command -v base64  >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "base64 not found - required for encoding"
    37→  command -v jq      >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "jq not found - required for JSON parsing"
    38→
    39→  buc_log_args "Ensure RBGC is kindled first"
    40→  zrbgc_sentinel
    41→
    42→  buc_log_args "Check environment"
    43→  test -n "${BURD_TEMP_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURD_TEMP_DIR not set"
    44→  test -d "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"   || buc_die "BURD_TEMP_DIR not a directory"
    45→
    46→  buc_log_args "Set Module Variables (ZRBGO_*)"
    47→  ZRBGO_JWT_HEADER_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_header.json"
    48→  ZRBGO_JWT_CLAIMS_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_claims.json"
    49→  ZRBGO_JWT_UNSIGNED_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_unsigned.txt"
    50→  ZRBGO_JWT_SIGNATURE_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_signature.txt"
    51→  ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_oauth_response.json"
    52→  ZRBGO_PRIVATE_KEY_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_private_key.pem"
    53→
    54→  ZRBGO_KINDLED=1
    55→}
    56→
    57→zrbgo_sentinel() {
    58→  test "${ZRBGO_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgo not kindled - call zrbgo_kindle first"
    59→}
    60→
    61→zrbgo_base64url_encode_capture() {
    62→  zrbgo_sentinel
    63→
    64→  local z_input="$1"
    65→
    66→  # Base64 encode (portable: no -w), strip newlines, then URL-safe transform and remove padding
    67→  printf '%s' "${z_input}" | base64 | tr -d '\n' | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '='
    68→}
    69→
    70→zrbgo_build_jwt_capture() {
    71→  zrbgo_sentinel
    72→
    73→  local z_rbra_file="$1"
    74→
    75→  buc_log_args "Source RBRA file"
    76→  # RBRA_* expected: CLIENT_EMAIL, PRIVATE_KEY, TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC
    77→  # RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY contains \n sequences that must become real newlines for openssl
    78→  # shellcheck disable=SC1090
    79→  source "${z_rbra_file}" || return 1
    80→
    81→  buc_log_args "Validate required variables"
    82→  test -n "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL:-}"       || return 1
    83→  test -n "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY:-}"        || return 1
    84→  test -n "${RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC:-}" || return 1
    85→
    86→  buc_log_args "Build JWT header"
    87→  printf '%s' '{"alg":"RS256","typ":"JWT"}' > "${ZRBGO_JWT_HEADER_FILE}"
    88→
    89→  buc_log_args "Calculate timestamps"
    90→  local z_now
    91→  z_now=$(date +%s) || return 1
    92→  local z_exp=$((z_now + RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC))
    93→
    94→  buc_log_args "Build JWT claims"
    95→  jq -n                                         \
    96→    --arg iss   "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL}"          \
    97→    --arg scope "${RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM}"  \
    98→    --arg aud   "${RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL}"       \
    99→    --argjson iat "${z_now}"                    \
   100→    --argjson exp "${z_exp}"                    \
   101→    '{iss: $iss, scope: $scope, aud: $aud, iat: $iat, exp: $exp}' \
   102→    > "${ZRBGO_JWT_CLAIMS_FILE}" || return 1
   103→
   104→  buc_log_args "Encode header and claims"
   105→  local z_header_enc
   106→  z_header_enc=$(zrbgo_base64url_encode_capture "$(<"${ZRBGO_JWT_HEADER_FILE}")") || return 1
   107→
   108→  local z_claims_enc
   109→  z_claims_enc=$(zrbgo_base64url_encode_capture "$(<"${ZRBGO_JWT_CLAIMS_FILE}")") || return 1
   110→
   111→  buc_log_args "Create unsigned JWT"
   112→  printf '%s' "${z_header_enc}.${z_claims_enc}" > "${ZRBGO_JWT_UNSIGNED_FILE}"
   113→
   114→  buc_log_args "Sign with RSA256 (without writing key to disk)"
   115→  # Convert literal \n sequences to real newlines via printf %b and feed via process substitution
   116→  openssl dgst -sha256 \
   117→    -sign <(printf '%b' "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY}\n") \
   118→    -out "${ZRBGO_JWT_SIGNATURE_FILE}" \
   119→    "${ZRBGO_JWT_UNSIGNED_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || return 1
   120→
   121→  buc_log_args "Base64url encode signature"
   122→  local z_signature
   123→  z_signature=$(base64 < "${ZRBGO_JWT_SIGNATURE_FILE}" | tr -d '\n' | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '=') || return 1
   124→
   125→  buc_log_args "Return complete JWT"
   126→  printf '%s\n' "${z_header_enc}.${z_claims_enc}.${z_signature}"
   127→}
   128→
   129→zrbgo_exchange_jwt_capture() {
   130→  zrbgo_sentinel
   131→
   132→  local z_jwt="$1"
   133→
   134→  buc_log_args "Exchange JWT for OAuth token"
   135→  curl -s -X POST "${RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL}"                                        \
   136→    -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"                           \
   137→    -d "grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:jwt-bearer&assertion=${z_jwt}" \
   138→    > "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || return 1
   139→
   140→  buc_log_args "Debug: Show the actual response (minus secrets)"
   141→  jq 'del(.access_token, .refresh_token)
   142→      | with_entries(select(.key | test("token|secret|key|password"; "i") | not))' \
   143→    "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}" 2>/dev/null | buc_log_pipe || buc_log_args "OAuth response parsing failed"
   144→
   145→  buc_log_args "OAuth token exchange completed"
   146→
   147→  buc_log_args "Extract access token"
   148→  local z_token
   149→  z_token=$(jq -r '.access_token // empty' "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}") || return 1
   150→  test -n "${z_token}" || return 1
   151→
   152→  printf '%s\n' "${z_token}"
   153→}
   154→
   155→######################################################################
   156→# External Functions (rbgo_*)
   157→
   158→rbgo_get_token_capture() {
   159→  zrbgo_sentinel
   160→
   161→  local z_rbra_file="$1"
   162→
   163→  # Documentation block
   164→  buc_doc_brief "Exchange service account credentials for OAuth2 access token"
   165→  buc_doc_param "rbra_file" "Path to RBRA credentials file containing RBRA_* variables"
   166→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   167→
   168→  buc_log_args "Validate RBRA file exists"
   169→  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || return 1
   170→
   171→  buc_log_args "Build JWT"
   172→  local z_jwt
   173→  z_jwt=$(zrbgo_build_jwt_capture "${z_rbra_file}") || return 1
   174→
   175→  buc_log_args "Exchange for OAuth token"
   176→  local z_token
   177→  z_token=$(zrbgo_exchange_jwt_capture "${z_jwt}") || return 1
   178→
   179→  printf '%s\n' "${z_token}"
   180→}
   181→
   182→# eof
   183→
