    18→#
    19→# RBRR CLI - Command line interface for RBRR repo regime operations
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    24→
    25→# Source dependencies
    26→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    27→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
    28→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
    29→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
    30→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcr_render.sh"
    31→
    32→######################################################################
    33→# CLI Functions
    34→
    35→zrbrr_cli_kindle() {
    36→  test -z "${ZRBRR_CLI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "RBRR CLI already kindled"
    37→
    38→  # GCB runs on linux/amd64 — pin digests must match this platform
    39→  ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS="linux"
    40→  ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH="amd64"
    41→
    42→  ZRBRR_CLI_KINDLED=1
    43→}
    44→
    45→# Command: validate - source file and validate (dies on first error)
    46→rbrr_validate() {
    47→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    48→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_validate: file argument required"
    49→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_validate: file not found: ${z_file}"
    50→
    51→  buc_step "Validating RBRR repo regime file: ${z_file}"
    52→
    53→  # Use rbrr_load for standardized loading
    54→  rbrr_load
    55→
    56→  buc_step "RBRR repo regime valid"
    57→}
    58→
    59→# Command: render - diagnostic display then validate
    60→rbrr_render() {
    61→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    62→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: file argument required"
    63→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: file not found: ${z_file}"
    64→
    65→  # Source and kindle (no dying — show all fields before validation)
    66→  source "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: failed to source ${z_file}"
    67→  zrbrr_kindle
    68→  zrbcr_kindle
    69→
    70→  # Display header
    71→  echo ""
    72→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}RBRR - Recipe Bottle Regime Repo${ZBUC_RESET}"
    73→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}File: ${z_file}${ZBUC_RESET}"
    74→  echo ""
    75→
    76→  # Vessel and Local Configuration
    77→  rbcr_section_begin "Vessel and Local Configuration"
    78→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_VESSEL_DIR              string  req  "Vessel definitions directory"
    79→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DNS_SERVER              ipv4    req  "DNS server for containers"
    80→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME     xname   req  "Podman machine for ignite operations"
    81→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME     xname   req  "Podman machine for deploy operations"
    82→  rbcr_section_end
    83→
    84→  # Build Tool Configuration
    85→  rbcr_section_begin "Build Tool Configuration"
    86→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ            string  req  "Crane binary archive path"
    87→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS      string  req  "Target platforms for manifests"
    88→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION   string  req  "Podman version (semantic version)"
    89→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN   fqin    req  "VM image origin reference"
    90→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY         string  req  "Identity for operations"
    91→  rbcr_section_end
    92→
    93→  # GCP Infrastructure
    94→  rbcr_section_begin "GCP Infrastructure"
    95→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID      gname   req  "GCP project ID for depot"
    96→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCP_REGION            gname   req  "GCP region"
    97→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY        gname   req  "Google Artifact Registry repository name"
    98→  rbcr_section_end
    99→
   100→  # Google Cloud Build Configuration
   101→  rbcr_section_begin "Google Cloud Build Configuration"
   102→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE            string  req  "Machine type for Cloud Build"
   103→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT                 string  req  "Build timeout (e.g., 1200s)"
   104→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS   decimal req "Min concurrent builds required"
   105→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF          odref   req  "oras image reference (digest-pinned)"
   106→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF        odref   req  "gcloud image reference (digest-pinned)"
   107→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF        odref   req  "docker image reference (digest-pinned)"
   108→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF        odref   req  "alpine image reference (digest-pinned)"
   109→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF          odref   req  "syft image reference (digest-pinned)"
   110→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF        odref   req  "binfmt image reference (digest-pinned)"
   111→  rbcr_section_end
   112→
   113→  # Service Account Configuration
   114→  rbcr_section_begin "Service Account Configuration"
   115→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE    string  req  "Governor service account key file"
   116→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE   string  req  "Retriever service account key file"
   117→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE    string  req  "Director service account key file"
   118→  rbcr_section_end
   119→
   120→  # Unexpected variables (from kindle, not gated)
   121→  if test ${#ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   122→    echo "${ZBUC_RED}Unexpected RBRR_ variables:${ZBUC_RESET}"
   123→    local z_var
   124→    for z_var in "${ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[@]}"; do
   125→      printf "  ${ZBUC_RED}%-30s${ZBUC_RESET} = %s\n" "${z_var}" "${!z_var:-}"
   126→    done
   127→    echo ""
   128→  fi
   129→
   130→  # Validate (dies on first error, after full display)
   131→  zrbrr_validate_fields
   132→  echo "${ZBUC_GREEN}RBRR repo regime valid${ZBUC_RESET}"
   133→}
   134→
   135→# Command: refresh_gcb_pins - resolve image tags to digests and update RBRR file
   136→# Every step must succeed or the function dies — no partial updates.
   137→# Requires: docker, jq, curl, RBCC_RBRR_FILE set, BURD_NOW_STAMP set, BURD_TEMP_DIR set
   138→rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins() {
   139→  local z_rbrr_file="${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   140→  test -f "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "RBRR config not found: ${z_rbrr_file}"
   141→  test -n "${BURD_NOW_STAMP:-}" || buc_die "BURD_NOW_STAMP not set - must be called from BURD"
   142→  test -d "${BURD_TEMP_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURD_TEMP_DIR not set or not a directory"
   143→
   144→  buc_countdown 5 "NOTE: Docker anonymous login is heavily rate limited.  Try again in 6 hours if you see that fail.  Continuing in:"
   145→
   146→  local z_vintage="${BURD_NOW_STAMP}"
   147→  local z_oras_token_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_token.json"
   148→  local z_oras_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_tags.json"
   149→  local z_oras_token_value_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_token_value.txt"
   150→  local z_oras_tag_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_tag.txt"
   151→  local z_refresh_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_refresh_"
   152→  local z_refresh_sed_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_refresh_sed_"
   153→
   154→  # Discover latest oras stable version from GHCR API.
   155→  # oras doesn't publish a :latest tag, so we must find the newest semver release.
   156→  # GHCR requires a bearer token even for public images.
   157→  buc_step "Discovering latest oras version from GHCR (no :latest tag published)"
   158→
   159→  buc_log_args "Obtaining GHCR bearer token (anonymous, scoped to oras repo)"
   160→  curl -sS \
   161→    "https://ghcr.io/token?scope=repository:oras-project/oras:pull&service=ghcr.io" \
   162→    -o "${z_oras_token_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   163→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch GHCR bearer token"
   164→
   165→  jq -r '.token // empty' "${z_oras_token_file}" > "${z_oras_token_value_file}" \
   166→    || buc_die "Failed to extract token from GHCR response"
   167→  local z_oras_token
   168→  z_oras_token=$(<"${z_oras_token_value_file}")
   169→  test -n "${z_oras_token}" || buc_die "GHCR returned empty bearer token"
   170→
   171→  buc_log_args "Fetching tag list using bearer token"
   172→  curl -sS \
   173→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_oras_token}" \
   174→    "https://ghcr.io/v2/oras-project/oras/tags/list?n=1000" \
   175→    -o "${z_oras_tags_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   176→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch oras tags from GHCR"
   177→
   178→  buc_log_args "Extracting newest stable semver tag"
   179→  # Filters to exact vN.N.N (no pre-release suffixes), sorts numerically, takes last
   180→  jq -r '
   181→    [.tags[] | select(test("^v[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"))]
   182→    | map(ltrimstr("v") | split(".") | map(tonumber))
   183→    | sort_by(.[0], .[1], .[2])
   184→    | last
   185→    | "v\(.[0]).\(.[1]).\(.[2])"
   186→  ' "${z_oras_tags_file}" > "${z_oras_tag_file}" \
   187→    || buc_die "Failed to extract semver tag from oras tags response"
   188→  local z_oras_tag
   189→  z_oras_tag=$(<"${z_oras_tag_file}")
   190→  test -n "${z_oras_tag}" -a "${z_oras_tag}" != "null" \
   191→    || buc_die "No stable oras semver tag found in GHCR tag list"
   192→  buc_info "oras discovered tag: ${z_oras_tag}"
   193→
   194→  # Discover latest crane release from GitHub API.
   195→  # crane is distributed as a tarball (not a container image), so it needs
   196→  # its own freshening path separate from the image-pin loop below.
   197→  local z_crane_releases_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_crane_releases.json"
   198→  local z_crane_tag_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_crane_tag.txt"
   199→  local z_crane_old_url_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_crane_old_url.txt"
   200→  local z_crane_sed_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_crane_sed.sh"
   201→
   202→  buc_step "Discovering latest crane release from GitHub"
   203→
   204→  curl -sS \
   205→    "https://api.github.com/repos/google/go-containerregistry/releases/latest" \
   206→    -o "${z_crane_releases_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   207→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch crane releases from GitHub API"
   208→
   209→  buc_log_args "Extracting tag from latest release"
   210→  jq -r '.tag_name // empty' "${z_crane_releases_file}" > "${z_crane_tag_file}" \
   211→    || buc_die "Failed to extract tag from crane releases response"
   212→  local z_crane_tag=$(<"${z_crane_tag_file}")
   213→  test -n "${z_crane_tag}" || buc_die "No tag found in crane latest release"
   214→  buc_info "crane discovered tag: ${z_crane_tag}"
   215→
   216→  local z_crane_url="https://github.com/google/go-containerregistry/releases/download/${z_crane_tag}/go-containerregistry_Linux_x86_64.tar.gz"
   217→
   218→  buc_log_args "Reading current RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ from rbrr file"
   219→  grep "^RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ=" "${z_rbrr_file}" | cut -d'=' -f2- > "${z_crane_old_url_file}" \
   220→    || buc_die "No existing value for RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ in rbrr file"
   221→  local z_old_crane_url=$(<"${z_crane_old_url_file}")
   222→  test -n "${z_old_crane_url}" || buc_die "Empty RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ value in rbrr file"
   223→
   224→  if test "${z_old_crane_url}" = "${z_crane_url}"; then
   225→    buc_info "RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ: unchanged (${z_crane_tag})"
   226→  else
   227→    buc_info "RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ: -> ${z_crane_url}"
   228→    sed "s|^RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ=.*|RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ=${z_crane_url}|" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_crane_sed_file}" \
   229→      || buc_die "Failed to sed value for RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ"
   230→    mv "${z_crane_sed_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ in rbrr file"
   231→  fi
   232→
   233→  # Image specifications: VARNAME|BASE_IMAGE|TAG
   234→  # Most images use :latest which always points to newest version.
   235→  # oras uses discovered semver tag above (no :latest published).
   236→  local z_specs=(
   237→    "RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF|ghcr.io/oras-project/oras|${z_oras_tag}"
   238→    "RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud|latest"
   239→    "RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker|latest"
   240→    "RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/library/alpine|latest"
   241→    "RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/anchore/syft|latest"
   242→    "RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/tonistiigi/binfmt|latest"
   243→  )
   244→
   245→  buc_step "Refreshing GCB tool image pins (vintage: ~${z_vintage})"
   246→
   247→  local z_updated=0
   248→  local z_unchanged=0
   249→
   250→  local z_spec=""
   251→  local z_varname=""
   252→  local z_image=""
   253→  local z_tag=""
   254→  local z_manifest_file=""
   255→  local z_digest_file=""
   256→  local z_oldref_file=""
   257→  local z_digest=""
   258→  local z_full_ref=""
   259→  local z_old_ref=""
   260→  local z_sed_value_file=""
   261→  local z_sed_vintage_file=""
   262→  for z_spec in "${z_specs[@]}"; do
   263→    IFS='|' read -r z_varname z_image z_tag <<< "${z_spec}"
   264→
   265→    z_manifest_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_manifest.json"
   266→    z_digest_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_digest.txt"
   267→    z_oldref_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_oldref.txt"
   268→    z_sed_value_file="${z_refresh_sed_prefix}${z_varname}_value.sh"
   269→    z_sed_vintage_file="${z_refresh_sed_prefix}${z_varname}_vintage.sh"
   270→
   271→    buc_step "Inspecting ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   272→
   273→    docker manifest inspect --verbose "${z_image}:${z_tag}" > "${z_manifest_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   274→      || buc_die "Failed to fetch manifest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   275→
   276→    buc_log_args "Extracting ${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS}/${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH} digest from manifest"
   277→    jq -r --arg os "${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS}" --arg arch "${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH}" '
   278→      if type == "array" then
   279→        [.[] | select(.Descriptor.platform.architecture == $arch
   280→                  and .Descriptor.platform.os == $os)][0].Descriptor.digest
   281→      else
   282→        .Descriptor.digest
   283→      end' \
   284→      "${z_manifest_file}" > "${z_digest_file}" \
   285→      || buc_die "Failed to extract digest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   286→    z_digest=$(<"${z_digest_file}")
   287→    test -n "${z_digest}" || buc_die "Empty digest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   288→    z_full_ref="${z_image}@${z_digest}"
   289→
   290→    grep "^${z_varname}=" "${z_rbrr_file}" | cut -d'"' -f2 > "${z_oldref_file}" \
   291→      || buc_die "No existing value for ${z_varname} in rbrr file"
   292→    z_old_ref=$(<"${z_oldref_file}")
   293→
   294→    if test "${z_old_ref}" = "${z_full_ref}"; then
   295→      buc_info "${z_varname}: unchanged"
   296→      z_unchanged=$((z_unchanged + 1))
   297→    else
   298→      buc_info "${z_varname}: ${z_old_ref} -> ${z_full_ref}"
   299→
   300→      sed "s|^${z_varname}=.*|${z_varname}=\"${z_full_ref}\"|" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_sed_value_file}" \
   301→        || buc_die "Failed to sed value for ${z_varname}"
   302→      mv "${z_sed_value_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update ${z_varname} in rbrr file"
   303→
   304→      buc_log_args "Updating vintage comment for ${z_varname}"
   305→      sed "/${z_varname}=/{
   306→        x
   307→        s|(~[^)]*)|(~${z_vintage})|
   308→        x
   309→      }" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_sed_vintage_file}" \
   310→        || buc_die "Failed to update vintage comment for ${z_varname}"
   311→      test -s "${z_sed_vintage_file}" || buc_die "Vintage sed produced empty output for ${z_varname}"
   312→      mv "${z_sed_vintage_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update vintage for ${z_varname}"
   313→
   314→      z_updated=$((z_updated + 1))
   315→    fi
   316→  done
   317→
   318→  buc_step "Refresh complete: ${z_updated} updated, ${z_unchanged} unchanged"
   319→}
   320→
   321→######################################################################
   322→# Main dispatch
   323→
   324→zrbrr_cli_kindle
   325→zrbcc_kindle
   326→
   327→z_command="${1:-}"
   328→
   329→case "${z_command}" in
   330→  validate|render)
   331→    z_file="${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   332→    test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "RBRR regime file not found: ${z_file}"
   333→    case "${z_command}" in
   334→      validate) rbrr_validate "${z_file}" ;;
   335→      render)   rbrr_render "${z_file}" ;;
   336→    esac
   337→    ;;
   338→  refresh_gcb_pins)
   339→    rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins
   340→    ;;
   341→  *)
   342→    buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}. Usage: rbrr_cli.sh {validate|render|refresh_gcb_pins}"
   343→    ;;
   344→esac
   345→
   346→# eof

    22→# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    23→# Operational Invariants (RBGG is single writer; 409 is fatal)
    24→#
    25→# - Single admin actor: All RBGG operations are executed by a single admin
    26→#   identity. There are no concurrent writers in the same project.
    27→# - Pristine-state expectation: RBGG init/creation flows assume the project
    28→#   is pristine for the resources they manage. If a resource "already exists"
    29→#   (HTTP 409), that's treated as state drift or prior manual activity.
    30→# - Policy: All HTTP 409 Conflict responses are fatal (buc_die). We do not
    31→#   treat 409 as idempotent success anywhere in RBGG.
    32→#   If you see a 409, resolve state drift first (destroy/reset), then rerun.
    33→# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    34→
    35→set -euo pipefail
    36→
    37→# Multiple inclusion detection
    38→test -z "${ZRBGG_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgg multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    39→ZRBGG_SOURCED=1
    40→
    41→######################################################################
    42→# Internal Functions (zrbgg_*)
    43→
    44→zrbgg_kindle() {
    45→  test -z "${ZRBGG_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgg already kindled"
    46→
    47→  test -n "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
    48→  test   "${#RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"
    49→
    50→  buc_log_args 'Ensure dependencies are kindled first'
    51→  zrbgc_sentinel
    52→  zrbgo_sentinel
    53→  zrbgu_sentinel
    54→  zrbgi_sentinel
    55→
    56→  ZRBGG_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_"
    57→  ZRBGG_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGG_PREFIX}empty.json"
    58→  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGG_EMPTY_JSON}"
    59→
    60→  # Infix values for HTTP operations
    61→  ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE="create"
    62→  ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY="verify"
    63→  ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY="key"
    64→  ZRBGG_INFIX_API_IAM_ENABLE="api_iam_enable"
    65→  ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CRM_ENABLE="api_crm_enable"
    66→  ZRBGG_INFIX_API_ART_ENABLE="api_art_enable"
    67→  ZRBGG_INFIX_API_BUILD_ENABLE="api_build_enable"
    68→  ZRBGG_INFIX_CB_SA_ACCOUNT_GEN="cb_account_gen"
    69→  ZRBGG_INFIX_CB_PRIME="cb_prime"
    70→  ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CONTAINERANALYSIS_ENABLE="api_containeranalysis_enable"
    71→  ZRBGG_INFIX_API_STORAGE_ENABLE="api_storage_enable"
    72→  ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO="project_info"
    73→  ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE_REPO="create_repo"
    74→  ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY_REPO="verify_repo"
    75→  ZRBGG_INFIX_DELETE_REPO="delete_repo"
    76→  ZRBGG_INFIX_REPO_POLICY="repo_policy"
    77→  ZRBGG_INFIX_RPOLICY_SET="repo_policy_set"
    78→  ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST="list"
    79→  ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CHECK="api_checking"
    80→  ZRBGG_INFIX_DELETE="delete"
    81→  ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS="list_keys"
    82→  ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE="bucket_create"
    83→  ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_DELETE="bucket_delete"
    84→  ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_LIST="bucket_list"
    85→  ZRBGG_INFIX_OBJECT_DELETE="object_delete"

    91→  ZRBGG_KINDLED=1

    94→zrbgg_sentinel() {

    98→######################################################################
    99→# Capture: list required services that are NOT enabled (blank = all enabled)
   100→zrbgg_required_apis_missing_capture() {
   101→  zrbgg_sentinel
   102→
   103→  local z_token="${1:-}"
   104→  test -n "${z_token}" || { echo ""; return 1; }
   105→
   106→  local z_missing=""
   107→  local z_api=""
   108→  local z_service=""
   109→  local z_infix=""
   110→  local z_state=""
   111→  local z_code=""
   112→
   113→  for z_api in                       \
   114→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_CRM}"      \
   115→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_GAR}"      \
   116→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_IAM}"      \
   117→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_BUILD}"    \
   118→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_ANALYSIS}" \
   119→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_STORAGE}"
   120→  do
   121→    z_service="${z_api##*/}"
   122→    z_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CHECK}_${z_service}"
   123→
   124→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_api}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" || true
   125→
   126→    buc_log_args 'If we cannot even read an HTTP code file, that is a processing failure.'
   127→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || z_code=""
   128→    test -n "${z_code}" || return 1
   129→
   130→    if test "${z_code}" = "200"; then
   131→      z_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".state") || z_state=""
   132→      test "${z_state}" = "ENABLED" || z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
   133→    else
   134→      buc_log_args 'Any non-200 (403/404/5xx/etc) => treat as NOT enabled'
   135→      z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
   136→    fi
   137→  done
   138→
   139→  printf '%s' "${z_missing# }"
   140→}
   141→
   142→zrbgg_create_service_account_with_key() {
   143→  zrbgg_sentinel
   144→
   145→  local z_account_name="$1"
   146→  local z_display_name="$2"
   147→  local z_description="$3"
   148→  local z_instance="$4"
   149→
   150→  local z_account_email="${z_account_name}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"
   151→
   152→  buc_step 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   153→  local z_token
   154→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   155→
   156→  buc_step "Create request JSON for ${z_account_name}"
   157→  jq -n                                      \
   158→    --arg account_id "${z_account_name}"     \
   159→    --arg display_name "${z_display_name}"   \
   160→    --arg description "${z_description}"     \
   161→    '{
   162→      accountId: $account_id,
   163→      serviceAccount: {
   164→        displayName: $display_name,
   165→        description: $description
   166→      }
   167→    }' > "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json" || buc_die "Failed to create request JSON"
   168→
   169→  buc_step 'Create service account via REST API'
   170→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}" "${z_token}" \
   171→    "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json"
   172→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Create service account" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}"
   173→  rbgu_newly_created_delay                      "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" "service account" 15
   174→  buc_info "Service account created: ${z_account_email}"
   175→
   176→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}" \
   177→                                   "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY}"
   178→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Verify service account" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY}"
   179→
   180→  buc_step 'Preflight: ensure no existing USER_MANAGED keys (manual cleanup path)'
   181→
   182→  buc_log_args 'List keys'
   183→  rbgu_http_json "GET"                                                        \
   184→    "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}${RBGC_PATH_KEYS}"        \
   185→                                      "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}"
   186→  rbgu_http_require_ok "List service account keys" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}"
   187→
   188→  buc_log_args 'Count existing user-managed keys'
   189→  local z_user_keys
   190→  z_user_keys=$(jq -r '[.keys[]? | select(.keyType=="USER_MANAGED")] | length' \
   191→                 "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}") \
   192→    || buc_die "Failed to parse service account keys"
   193→
   194→  if test "${z_user_keys}" -gt 0; then
   195→    buc_log_args 'Provide a console URL to delete keys manually, then rerun this command'
   196→    local z_sa_email_enc="${z_account_email//@/%40}"
   197→    local z_keys_url="${RBGC_CONSOLE_URL}iam-admin/serviceaccounts/details/${z_sa_email_enc}?project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
   198→
   199→    buc_warn "Found ${z_user_keys} existing USER_MANAGED key(s) on ${z_account_email}."
   200→    buc_info "Open Console, select the **Keys** tab, delete old keys, then rerun:"
   201→    buc_info "  ${z_keys_url}"
   202→    buc_die  "Aborting to avoid minting additional keys."
   203→  fi
   204→
   205→  buc_step 'Generate service account key'
   206→  local z_key_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_key_request.json"
   207→  printf '%s' '{"privateKeyType": "TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE"}' > "${z_key_req}"
   208→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}${RBGC_PATH_KEYS}" \
   209→                                         "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY}" "${z_key_req}"
   210→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Generate service account key" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY}"
   211→
   212→  buc_step 'Extract and decode key data'
   213→  local z_key_b64
   214→  z_key_b64=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY}" '.privateKeyData') \
   215→    || buc_die "Failed to extract privateKeyData"
   216→  local z_key_json="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_key_${z_instance}.json"
   217→  buc_log_args 'Tolerate macos base64 difference'
   218→  if ! printf '%s' "${z_key_b64}" | base64 -d > "${z_key_json}" 2>/dev/null; then
   219→       printf '%s' "${z_key_b64}" | base64 -D > "${z_key_json}" 2>/dev/null \
   220→      || buc_die "Failed to decode key data"
   221→  fi
   222→
   223→  buc_step 'Convert JSON key to RBRA format'
   224→  local z_rbra_file="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${z_instance}.rbra"
   225→
   226→  local z_client_email
   227→  z_client_email=$(jq -r '.client_email' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract client_email"
   228→  test -n "${z_client_email}" || buc_die "Empty client_email in key JSON"
   229→
   230→  local z_private_key
   231→  z_private_key=$(jq -r '.private_key' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract private_key"
   232→  test -n "${z_private_key}" || buc_die "Empty private_key in key JSON"
   233→
   234→  local z_project_id
   235→  z_project_id=$(jq -r '.project_id' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract project_id"
   236→  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "Empty project_id in key JSON"
   237→
   238→  buc_step 'Write RBRA file' "${z_rbra_file}"
   239→  {
   240→    printf 'RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL="%s"\n'      "$z_client_email"
   241→    printf 'RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY="'; printf '%s' "$z_private_key"; printf '"\n'
   242→    printf 'RBRA_PROJECT_ID="%s"\n'        "$z_project_id"
   243→    printf 'RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC=1800\n'
   244→  } > "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"
   245→
   246→  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"
   247→
   248→  rm -f "${z_key_json}"
   249→  buc_info "RBRA file written: ${z_rbra_file}"
   250→}

   322→zrbgg_list_bucket_objects_capture() {
   323→  zrbgg_sentinel
   324→
   325→  local z_token="${1}"
   326→  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
   327→
   328→  local z_list_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/o"
   329→  local z_page_token=""
   330→  local z_first=1
   331→
   332→  while :; do
   333→    buc_log_args "Build URL with optional pageToken -> ${z_first}"
   334→    local z_url="${z_list_url_base}"
   335→    if test -n "${z_page_token}"; then
   336→      buc_log_args 'pageToken must be URL-encoded'
   337→      local z_tok_enc
   338→      z_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_page_token}") || return 1
   339→      z_url="${z_url}?pageToken=${z_tok_enc}"
   340→    fi
   341→
   342→    buc_log_args 'Use a unique infix per page to avoid clobbering files'
   343→    local z_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_LIST}${z_first}"
   344→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}"
   345→
   346→    local z_code
   347→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || return 1
   348→    test "${z_code}" = "200" || return 1
   349→
   350→    buc_log_args 'Print names from this page (if any)'
   351→    buc_log_args 'Next page?'
   352→    jq -r                '.items[]?.name // empty' "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"  || return 1
   353→    z_page_token=$(jq -r '.nextPageToken // empty' "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}") || return 1
   354→
   355→    test -n "${z_page_token}" || break
   356→    z_first=$((z_first + 1))
   357→  done
   358→}

   376→zrbgg_empty_gcs_bucket() {
   377→  zrbgg_sentinel
   378→
   379→  local z_token="${1}"
   380→  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
   381→
   382→  buc_log_args 'Get list of objects to delete'
   383→  local z_objects
   384→  z_objects=$(zrbgg_list_bucket_objects_capture "${z_token}" "${z_bucket_name}") || {
   385→    buc_log_args 'No objects found or bucket not accessible'
   386→    return 0
   387→  }
   388→
   389→  test -n "${z_objects}" || { buc_log_args 'Bucket is empty'; return 0; }
   390→
   391→  buc_log_args 'Delete each object'
   392→  local z_object=""
   393→  local z_delete_url=""
   394→  local z_delete_code=""
   395→  while IFS= read -r z_object; do
   396→    test -n "${z_object}" || continue
   397→    buc_log_args "Deleting object: ${z_object}"
   398→
   399→    local z_object_enc
   400→    z_object_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_object}") || z_object_enc=""
   401→    test -n "${z_object_enc}" || { buc_warn "Failed to encode object name: ${z_object}"; continue; }
   402→    z_delete_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/o/${z_object_enc}"
   403→
   404→    rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_url}" \
   405→                              "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_OBJECT_DELETE}"
   406→    z_delete_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_OBJECT_DELETE}") || z_delete_code=""
   407→    case "${z_delete_code}" in
   408→      204|404) buc_log_args "Object ${z_object}: deleted or not found"                     ;;
   409→      *)       buc_warn     "Object ${z_object}: Failed to delete (HTTP ${z_delete_code})" ;;
   410→    esac
   411→  done <<< "${z_objects}"
   412→}

   710→rbgg_restore_project() {

   714→

   745→

    64→  elif command -v shasum >/dev/null 2>&1; then

   152→
